title: Kofi and the Lost Lion Cub
synopsis: Little Kofi discovers a lost lion cub in the savanna and helps reunite it with its mama in a heartwarming adventure filled with animal friends.

pages.text: Kofi walked through the tall golden grass. The sun was warm on his face. He loved exploring the savanna near his home.

illustration.description: A young boy with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes walking through tall golden savanna grass. Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes, warm orange sunset colors, textured painterly style with bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Kofi walking through golden savanna grass

pages.text: Suddenly, Kofi heard a tiny sound. 'Mew, mew!' It was coming from behind a big rock. What could it be?

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes looking curiously toward a large rock. A small lion cub peeks out from behind it. Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly style.
illustration.alt: Kofi discovering a lion cub behind a rock

pages.text: A fluffy lion cub sat alone, crying softly. 'Oh no!' said Kofi. 'Where is your mama, little one?'

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes kneeling next to a small, fluffy lion cub. The cub looks sad. Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes, warm colors, expressive animals, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Kofi comforting a sad lion cub

pages.text: Kofi picked up the cub gently. 'Don't worry, I'll help you find your mama.' The cub snuggled close to Kofi's chest.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes holding a small lion cub tenderly in his arms. The cub looks comfortable. Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly style.
illustration.alt: Kofi holding the lion cub safely

pages.text: They met a wise old elephant. 'Have you seen a mama lion?' asked Kofi. The elephant pointed with her trunk toward the acacia trees.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes talking to a large, wise-looking elephant while holding the lion cub. The elephant points toward distant acacia trees. Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes, warm colors, expressive animals, bold strokes.
illustration.alt: Kofi and the cub getting directions from an elephant

pages.text: A colorful parrot flew down. 'I saw her!' squawked the parrot. 'Follow me!' The bird led them through the golden grass.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes following a bright parrot while carrying the lion cub. They walk through golden grass under an orange sunset. Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes, textured painterly style.
illustration.alt: Kofi following a parrot through the savanna

pages.text: There she was! A big mama lion sat under a tree, looking worried. When she saw her cub, she roared with joy!

illustration.description: A large, majestic mama lion under an acacia tree looking relieved and happy. Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes approaches with the cub. Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Mama lion reunited with her cub

pages.text: The cub ran to his mama and nuzzled her neck. Mama lion looked at Kofi and purred softly. 'Thank you,' she seemed to say.

illustration.description: The lion cub cuddling with mama lion while Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes watches happily nearby. The scene is warm and loving. Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes, warm colors, textured painterly style.
illustration.alt: Happy reunion between mama lion and her cub

pages.text: Kofi smiled as he walked home. He had made new friends and helped a family come together. What a wonderful day!

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes walking home with a big smile as the sun sets. In the background, the lion family rests peacefully together. Gouache painting with thick brushstrokes, golden grass, orange sunset, bold strokes.
illustration.alt: Kofi walking home happily at sunset

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What sound did Kofi hear behind the rock?
questions.explanation: Kofi heard 'Mew, mew!' which was the little lion cub crying for his mama.

questions.question: Who helped Kofi find the mama lion?
questions.explanation: The wise elephant pointed toward the trees, and the colorful parrot led Kofi to the mama lion.

questions.question: Where was the mama lion when they found her?
questions.explanation: The mama lion was sitting under an acacia tree, looking worried about her lost cub.

questions.question: How did Kofi feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: Kofi felt happy because he had helped reunite the lion family and made new friends.
